title: crepidaria cordellata
intro: Crepidaria cordellata, also known as the Cordell's fringed orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Crepidaria cordellata include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the roots and leaves, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
